meta.name: Cyan Elegance
meta.description: A high-end luxury e-commerce design characterized by an editorial layout, ample whitespace, and high-contrast typography. It utilizes a signature light teal accent color against stark white and subtle grey backgrounds to convey premium quality and refined heritage.

header.notes: Two-tier header construction. Top row features utility icons (search, location) on the left, an absolutely centered brand logo in a serif font, and action icons (account, cart) on the right. A secondary row below contains centered navigation links. Sits immediately below a full-width solid teal promotional banner.

footer.notes: Spacious layout with a slightly off-white background to differentiate from the main page. Features a 4-column link structure. A horizontal divider line separates the links from the bottom copyright area, which contains regional settings on the left, a large centered monogram icon, and social media links on the right. A floating teal chat widget sits over the bottom right corner.

productCard.notes: Extreme minimalism. Images sit within a perfectly square aspect ratio on a very faint off-white background (#f8f8f8) with no visible borders. Text is centered below the image: title in a serif font, subtitle and price below in a smaller sans-serif font. No visible add-to-cart buttons in default state.

productGrid.notes: A strictly uniform grid layout, but interspersed with 'editorial' tiles that break the pattern. Some grid spots are replaced by lifestyle imagery or dark newsletter signup blocks featuring stark white, sharp-cornered CTA buttons ('SHOP THE LOOK', 'SIGN UP'). Generous white space between columns.

featuredProducts.heading: Shop by Category
featuredProducts.notes: Displays a horizontal row of square images, each featuring a consistent teal thematic background displaying a specific product type, with uppercase category names centered underneath.

design.styling: Extremely narrow height, sits at the very top edge of the viewport

content.body: Brief promotional or informational text with an inline link

sections.name: hero-split
sections.layout: 2-column grid, 50/50 split. Image flush left, text block centered in the right half.

design.background: Solid white or very faint grey behind the text
design.text: Dark, high-contrast. Large serif display heading, smaller sans-serif body text.
design.styling: No visible boundaries or borders between the split sections. Edge-to-edge full width.

content.headline: Aspirational category or collection title
content.body: One to two sentences describing craftsmanship and heritage.

media.description: Abstract, high-end product photography featuring jewelry resting on curved, glossy teal surfaces with dramatic lighting.

sections.notes: Creates an immediate editorial feel upon scrolling past the header.

design.styling: Top and bottom subtle grey borders spanning full width, generous vertical padding.

content.specialElements: Dropdown triggers on left and right, product count centered, toggle switch for personalization.

sections.name: product-grid

design.text: Dark foreground, serif titles, sans-serif prices
design.styling: Very loose layout, large gaps between items. Items are a mix of standard products and full-bleed editorial image tiles.

content.cta: Single 'VIEW MORE' button centered at the bottom of the grid: white background, black text, thin black border, sharp square corners (0rem radius), uppercase text. Editorial tiles feature solid white 'SHOP THE LOOK' buttons with sharp square corners.

media.description: Gold and silver jewelry isolated on faint off-white square backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Pagination text and 'BACK TO TOP' link below the 'View More' button.

sections.notes: The inclusion of dark, full-bleed tiles within the standard grid creates visual rhythm.

sections.name: category-showcase
sections.layout: Full-width single column containing a centered heading, followed by a horizontal row/grid of items.

design.text: Large serif heading centered above. Category labels below images are small, dark, uppercase sans-serif.
design.styling: Generous margin above the section. Images are perfectly square.

content.headline: Instructional heading to browse by product type

media.description: Grid of 6 square images. Each image features a single piece of jewelry against a signature teal/cyan glossy background, creating a unified color block effect.

sections.notes: Visually distinct from the main product grid due to the heavy use of the brand's accent color in the photography.

sections.name: newsletter-signup

design.styling: Very minimal. Input field has no background or side/top borders, only a thin bottom border.

content.headline: Call to action for brand updates
content.cta: Single button placed inline to the right of the input field: light beige/grey background, black text, no border, sharp square corners (0rem radius), uppercase text.

sections.notes: Input and button form a single horizontal visual line.
